notes: Riley Blake Designs' solid cotton line, sold as Confetti Cotton™ Solids. The manufacturer website is backed by a NetSuite SCA JSON catalog; the scraper paginates that API rather than scraping HTML and filters the 410 category items down to the 300 base colors (SKUs matching `^C120-[A-Z0-9]+$`, excluding precuts, 20-yard bolts, and swatch cards). Like Art Gallery Fabrics Pure Solids, images are flat rendered swatches rather than fabric photographs, so the classifier routes them to the algorithmic-only branch.
